segments: : مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ التَّغَابُنِ فِی فَرِیضَهٍ کَانَتْ شَفِیعَهً لَهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ شَاهِدَ عَدْلٍ عِنْدَ مَنْ یُجِیزُ شَهَادَتَهَا ثُمَّ لَا یُفَارِقُهَا حَتَّی یَدْخُلَ الْجَنَّهَ.
arabic.text: : مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ التَّغَابُنِ فِی فَرِیضَهٍ کَانَتْ شَفِیعَهً لَهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ شَاهِدَ عَدْلٍ عِنْدَ مَنْ یُجِیزُ شَهَادَتَهَا ثُمَّ لَا یُفَارِقُهَا حَتَّی یَدْخُلَ الْجَنَّهَ.

segments: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: One who recites Surah Taghabun in his obligatory prayers it will intercede for him on the Day of Judgment, offer evidence for him in justice, near one who considers its testimony justified for himself, it would not separate from him till it has him admitted in Paradise.
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: One who recites Surah Taghabun in his obligatory prayers it will intercede for him on the Day of Judgment, offer evidence for him in justice, near one who considers its testimony justified for himself, it would not separate from him till it has him admitted in Paradise.

narratorChain.raw: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ قَرَأَ بِالْمُسَبَّحَاتِ کُلِّهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ یَنَامَ لَمْ یَمُتْ حَتَّی یُدْرِکَ الْقَائِمَ ع وَ إِنْ مَاتَ کَانَ فِی جِوَارِ النَّبِیِّ ص.
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ قَرَأَ بِالْمُسَبَّحَاتِ کُلِّهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ یَنَامَ لَمْ یَمُتْ حَتَّی یُدْرِکَ الْقَائِمَ ع وَ إِنْ مَاتَ کَانَ فِی جِوَارِ النَّبِیِّ ص.

segments: 2.  Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) said, “One who recites all the recommendations before going to bed will not die until he sees Qaim-e-Aale Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and if he dies he will  get  place  in  the  neighborhood  of  the  Holy  Prophet (s.a.w.s.).”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 2.  Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) said, “One who recites all the recommendations before going to bed will not die until he sees Qaim-e-Aale Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and if he dies he will  get  place  in  the  neighborhood  of  the  Holy  Prophet (s.a.w.s.).”

narratorChain.raw: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مِسْکِینٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ بَکْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَ
